commit.message:
fix(api): improve retry logic with error classification and longer timeouts

callWithRetry now distinguishes retryable errors (429, 500+, timeout,
abort, network) from non-retryable ones (400, 401, 404). Inner API
functions throw errors up to callWithRetry instead of swallowing them.
Client timeouts increased from 45s to 55s. Exponential backoff starts
at 2s, caps at 10s, with 3 total attempts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: content_type별 프롬프트 슬롯 시스템 도입 (스토리 품질 개선)

- 문제: 전래동화/동화/교육/다큐 등 content_type과 무관하게 바이럴 콘텐츠용
  프롬프트(ZERO BOREDOM, FORESHADOWING, celebrity-level 등)가 일괄 적용되어
  스토리 품질 저하 (이상한 반전, 부적절한 톤, 현대적 표현 혼입)

- 해결: 프롬프트 슬롯 아키텍처 (Method A+)
  - 하드코딩된 ROLE/TASK/구조규칙/나레이션톤/캐릭터가이드를 변수로 추출
  - CONTENT_TYPE_RULES에 오버라이드 필드 추가 (없으면 기본값 유지)
  - content_type별로 규칙 블록을 통째로 교체하여 충돌 원천 차단

- 변경 파일:
  - story_agent.py: 기본값 상수 10개 + 슬롯 로딩 + Step1/2 프롬프트 변수화
  - prompt_builder.py: 씬 이미지 품질 텍스트 content_type 분기
  - story_prompt.md: content_type 우선 메타 지시 추가

- 오버라이드 적용 content_type:
  - folktale: 옛이야기체, 권선징악 구조, 아동 친화 캐릭터, twist_note OFF
  - fairytale: 동화체, 모험/교훈 구조, 귀엽고 친근한 캐릭터
  - educational: 해설체, 학습 목표 구조, 깨끗한 캐릭터
  - documentary: 차분한 해설체, 사실 기반 나레이션, 현실적 캐릭터

- 회귀 안전: fiction/mystery/romance/sf/horror 등은 오버라이드 없음 → 기본값 유지

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix ESPN athlete stats URL: use season-specific endpoint for per-game averages

/statistics/0 returns career totals (e.g. 10142 total pts, not 16.8 PPG).
Correct endpoint: /seasons/2026/types/2/athletes/{id}/statistics
which returns current 2025-26 regular season per-game averages.
avgPoints/avgRebounds/avgAssists field names were already correct.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix sandbox pn connecting to ephemeral daemon instead of host

Inside the Docker sandbox, localhost resolves to the container's own
loopback, so pn could not reach the host daemon via daemon.url. It
would silently auto-start a separate daemon with an empty database,
causing all issue mutations (close, claim, etc.) to be lost when the
sandbox exited.

The pn client now detects /.dockerenv and rewrites localhost/127.0.0.1
to host.docker.internal in daemon.url before connecting. Ralph also
allows host.docker.internal through the sandbox network proxy.

commit.message:
fix: restore hero video as full-screen background with 70% opacity, scroll-driven playback

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Remove consensus-critical env vars from production compose

EVAL_INTERVAL_BLOCKS, WEIGHT_INTERVAL_BLOCKS, EMA_ALPHA, and
INACTIVITY_BLOCKS should not be user-configurable — they affect
validator consensus. Python defaults apply. Staging compose retains
them for dev use.

commit.message:
feat(objects): three-tier state persistence with ObjectStateStore (v0.30.0)

ObjectStateStore provides volatile (memory), session (sessionStorage),
and persistent (server, future) state storage. Auto-saves on state
change events, saves all on shutdown, restores on map load. Door state
now persists across page reloads. Completes Phase 4 Stage 2.

fix: surface api_key on claim page to prevent lockout

Agents sometimes lose their api_key before saving it (key is only returned
at registration). Since clicking the claim URL proves ownership, it is safe
to return and display the key there as a recovery path.

- Claim POST response: include api_key
- Claim GET response: include api_key when already claimed
- Claim page: display api_key with copy button after claiming
- skill.md: stronger "save immediately" warning + note about recovery via claim page

- Update aws-lc-sys 0.37.1 → 0.38.0 (via aws-lc-rs 1.16.1) to resolve
  3 high-severity Dependabot alerts (PKCS7_verify bypass, AES-CCM timing)
- Fix SQS batch test: handle partial message receive and remove fragile
  empty-queue assertion that caused "integer expression expected" error

commit.message:
feat: Linux 真彩色询问 + Dracula 256 色方案备选

安装时在 Linux 上新增交互询问：

  [1] 真彩色 Snazzy（推荐）— 适合 iTerm2/GNOME Terminal/Alacritty 等
  [2] 256 色 Dracula    — 通用兼容，SSH/老终端/不确定环境首选

Dracula 256-color 配色 (config/p10k-dracula.zsh)：
  - grey   61  (紫灰，Dracula comment #6272a4)
  - blue   117 (亮青蓝，Dracula cyan   #8be9fd) ← 目录色
  - magenta 212 (亮粉，Dracula pink   #ff79c6) ← 提示符
  - red    203 (亮红，Dracula red     #ff5555)
  - yellow 227 (亮黄，Dracula yellow  #f1fa8c)
  - cyan   84  (亮绿，Dracula green   #50fa7b)
  - white  255 (近白，Dracula fg      #f8f8f2)

install.sh 变更：
  - ask_truecolor() 函数：带说明的双选菜单
  - Linux 安装前自动调用询问
  - 根据选择复制 p10k.zsh 或 p10k-dracula.zsh
  - 选 256 色时追加 TERM=xterm-256color 到 .zshrc
  - 选 256 色时跳过 Snazzy 终端配色步骤
  - 完成提示根据选择显示不同说明

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix decoderConfig colorSpace copy for Safari's getter-only props (v7)

Safari's VideoColorSpace uses getter-only properties that don't copy
with simple object spread. Now manually extracts each property with
fallback defaults. Also always provides colorSpace object (never
undefined) to prevent mp4-muxer null access.

Added version marker (v7) to debug to verify cache freshness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Refactor main.py: constants, type hints, _parse_lpoptions, split generate_id_photo

- Add 6 named constants (YOLO_MODEL, KEYPOINT_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD, etc.)
- Add type hints to all functions
- Unify chr(39) usage to literal quotes via pre-computed safe_tray
- Extract _parse_lpoptions() to eliminate duplicated lpoptions parsing in get_paper_sizes/get_trays/get_qualities
- Split generate_id_photo() into _detect_pose() and _calc_crop_region() helpers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

chore: bump plugin versions to 1.1.0 (#7)

* refactor: remove BIG/SMALL CHANGE quota and improve issue description format

Three problems addressed in review-protocol.md:

1. Remove Phase 0 auto-detect and SMALL/BIG CHANGE distinction
   - Eliminated the per-area quota system that forced model to manufacture issues
   - Replaced with "Report Guidelines": report only real issues, up to 4 per area
   - Removed {REVIEW_MODE} placeholder from prompt templates and report format

2. Expand Problem field to What/Why/Impact structure
   - Old: single-line "Concrete description of the issue"
   - New: What (what is wrong) / Why (root cause) / Impact (actual harm or risk)
   - Applied to both Plan review and Code review prompt templates

3. Tone down Engineering Standards to reduce over-engineering pressure
   - DRY: "aggressively" → "only when it causes real maintenance problems"
   - Well-tested: "rather have too many" → "focus on critical paths and edge cases"
   - Added explicit principle: "no issue is a valid finding"

Applied to: Engineering Preferences block, Review Prompt Template, Code Review Prompt Template

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: always overwrite existing rule files on install

Previously skipped files that already existed (name-only check),
causing updates to be silently ignored on reinstall.
Now matches codex-review-core behavior: always overwrite with warning.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: update setup skill with dynamic cache paths and content comparison

Three issues fixed in setup/SKILL.md:

1. Cache paths were hardcoded to old v1 single-plugin structure
   (~/.claude/plugins/cache/codex-app-server-plugin/).
   Now uses `find` to locate files version-independently:
   - codex-review.mjs: codex-review-core cache
   - rules/*.md: codex-review-rules cache

2. Step 1 only checked file existence (name-only), missing staleness detection.
   Now uses `diff -q` to compare installed vs cache content:
   MATCH / MISSING / DIFFER states with appropriate actions.
   DIFFER files prompt user to update via AskUserQuestion.

3. Step 6 completion message referenced gpt-5.3-codex (old default).
   Updated to gpt-5.4 with --model override note.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: bump version to 1.1.0

Ensures /plugin update refreshes the cache instead of skipping
when the version hasn't changed.

Changes since 1.0.0:
- feat: --model flag and CODEX_REVIEW_MODEL env var (#3)
- refactor: remove BIG/SMALL CHANGE quota, improve issue format (#4)
- fix: always overwrite rule files on install (#5)
- fix: setup skill dynamic cache paths + content comparison (#5)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
[hipDNN] Add hipdnn and DNN providers as superbuild components (#5077)

## Motivation

Have a easy way to build hipdnn and all dnn providers with a single
cmake configure and build.

## Technical Details

Enable hipdnn, miopen-provider, and hipblaslt-provider as opt-in
superbuild components. These are not included in the default 'all' build
and must be explicitly requested via ROCM_LIBS_ENABLE_COMPONENTS.

- Split SUPPORTED_COMPONENTS into DEFAULT_COMPONENTS (used by 'all') and
SUPPORTED_COMPONENTS (includes DNN components)
- Add add_subdirectory_with_message blocks for hipdnn, miopen-provider,
and hipblaslt-provider with correct ordering (hipdnn before providers)
- Add CMake presets for hipdnn, miopen-provider, and hipblaslt-provider
- Replace linux-amdclang toolchain with cross-platform rocm-clang
toolchain that auto-detects OS (amdclang on Linux, clang on Windows)
- Make Fortran language optional via check_language() so hipdnn-only
builds work on systems without a Fortran compiler
- Add CMakeUserPresets.json and build/ to .gitignore

## Test Plan

Build on windows and linux. Build and tests should pass for the added
components.

## Test Result

<!-- Briefly summarize test outcomes. -->

## Submission Checklist

- [ ] Look over the contributing guidelines at
https://github.com/ROCm/ROCm/blob/develop/CONTRIBUTING.md#pull-requests.

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Co-authored-by: BrianHarrisonAMD <169072757+BrianHarrisonAMD@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: obsidian-tools
repository.description: Local MCP tools for using an LLM to work with a vault of markdown notes

commit.message:
fix(system): use Node.js 22 LTS (openclaw requires >=22.12.0)

NodeSource setup_20.x gave Node 20.20.1, but openclaw@2026.2.26
requires Node >=22.12.0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: openclaw-infra
repository.description: Secure self-hosted OpenClaw deployment on Hetzner Cloud with Tailscale

commit.message:
feat: add COI module with admin visibility, feature gating, and full CRUD

- Add insureds CRUD (list, detail, create, edit, delete) with Book of Business pages
- Add policies CRUD with dynamic limits fields per coverage type
- Add COI generation API with ACORD 25 and branded PDF generation (pdf-lib)
- Add COI email delivery via SendGrid with PDF attachments
- Add COI resend and CSV import (papaparse) functionality
- Add admin COI overview page with stats (total certs, monthly, avg gen time, per-client breakdown)
- Add coi_enabled boolean feature flag on companies table (default false)
- Add reusable checkCOIAccess utility for server-side gating
- Gate client nav (Book item), pages (insureds list/detail), and all API routes behind coi_enabled
- Add COI toggle in admin client settings for per-client activation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: replace logo-horizontal.png with correct transparent version

- Replace logo-horizontal.png with proper file (alpha channel for dark bg)
- TopBar: width=140 height=36 with h-9 w-auto for proper scaling
- Auth layout: width=280 height=80 for larger entry display
- Cast receiver: same proportional sizing
- No text "Capivarex" duplicated — logo PNG already includes the brand name

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
